# Retile Bathroom Walls

## Outcome

Bathroom walls are tiled and grouted.

## Parts

- Wall tiles | 1 | set
- Tile adhesive | 2 | bags | suitable for wet areas

## Tools

- Tile cutter
- Notched trowel

## Steps

1. Remove loose tiles.

2. Prepare wall surface.

3. Apply adhesive and set tiles.

4. Grout tiles.
